productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue Cr_Aess 3s Polo T-Shirt
description: Electric blue short Sleeve sleeves polo neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with a ribbed collar that has a fabric tape detailing on the inseam, three sky blue stripes on the shoulders upto the cuff signifying the adidas logo, Short Sleeve buttoned placket, embroidered brand name and logo on the left chest, vented hem and engineered with ClimaLite technology
